title: The Found Family Cookbook
description: After aging out of foster care at eighteen, Reese rents a room in a crumbling house full of strangers — a retired bus driver, two grad students, and a woman who never leaves her room. The only shared rule: Sunday dinner is mandatory. Over a year of clumsy, argued-over meals, six people who chose nobody slowly become a family anyway.

chapters.title: The Room with the Slanted Floor
